author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
C.A.B.A. - Announcement Trailer | PS5 & PSVR2 Games
There's a station on Buenos Aires' Line H that only appears at night. You found it. C.A.B.A. is a short first-person survival horror experience, our take on the Backrooms metro level, coming to PS5 with PS VR2 support. 

Wishlist now on PlayStation Store - https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10019663

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2: Cost of Hope - “Between Duty and Freedom” Story Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/stalker-2-heart-of-chornobyl/

Miracles of the Zone always come with a catch.
Freedom has always been eager to harness them for a “greater good” and the progress of the Mainland — though certainly not refusing the riches that come by side. Duty, on the other hand, sees anything anomalous in the Zone as a threat that must be eliminated, no matter the cost and collateral damage.
Get ready, stalkers! Things are about to get serious. The time to learn the Cost of Hope is approaching.
Head out on a new expedition into the Zone in this massive, nonlinear expansion. Dozens of gameplay hours packed with unforgettable stories and twisted characters. 

#ps5 #ps5games 

Rated Mature

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
The First Descendant x Evangelion Collaboration Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/the-first-descendant/

The First Descendant meets EVANGELION!
Iconic full-body skins of Rei, Asuka and Mari, weapon skins, social motions, and more!
Experience all the charm of EVANGELION through a full-lineup of customization items.
Coming June 18th!
